SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-13-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:03am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, dept. 525, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, Yin Zhu, appears in Pro Per; Appellant, Ying Zhu, appears in Pro Per. Kent Lee, appears with Ms. Zheng, as a witness and spokesperson; Chow Jen Tsang, appears with Mr. Zhu as a witness. Parties and witnesses, previously sworn, present their cases in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
